goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'norwich'.
The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should 'arrive by 15:30'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'price', and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college' and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should go to norwich
The train should leave on wednesday and should arrive by 15:30
Make sure you get train ID, price, and departure time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college and should be in the centre
Make sure you get entrance fee and postcode
